message:
refactor(fcp-mesh): extract load_symbol_meta helper method

Moves symbol metadata loading and zone validation into a dedicated
async helper method:

- `load_symbol_meta(&SymbolRequest) -> Result<ObjectSymbolMeta, Error>`
- Encapsulates object_id lookup from symbol store
- Handles ObjectNotFound vs other store errors
- Validates zone_id consistency (request vs stored)

This improves readability of handle_symbol_request by extracting the
metadata retrieval logic into a focused, reusable helper. The validation
behavior is unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
